requirement: Information Security Policies - provide management direction and support for information security
Organization of Information Security - establish management framework for implementation
verification_method: Review governance structure and constitution hierarchy

requirement: Human Resource Security - ensure employees and contractors understand responsibilities
Asset Management - identify organizational assets and define protection responsibilities
Information Classification - ensure information receives appropriate level of protection
Media Handling - prevent unauthorized disclosure modification removal or destruction
verification_method: Review data handling and retention policies

requirement: Access Control - limit access to information and information processing facilities
verification_method: Review access control policies and implementation

requirement: Cryptography - ensure proper and effective use of cryptography
Operations Security - ensure correct and secure operations of information processing
verification_method: Review operational security policies and quality gates

requirement: Communications Security - ensure protection of information in networks
System Acquisition Development and Maintenance - ensure security is integral part of information systems
verification_method: Review development quality gates and review processes

requirement: Information Security Incident Management - ensure consistent approach to management of incidents
Business Continuity Management - ensure information security continuity embedded in BCM
Compliance - avoid breaches of legal statutory regulatory or contractual obligations
